highlight.header: Trout, Judge, and the Short Porch!
highlight.point1: The Short Porch out muscled DBTSY with 18 HRs in what might be the best batting matchup of the year
highlight.point2: DBTSY pitching failed him. Posting a league worst 6.13 ERA
highlight.point3: Better late then never. Congrats to Fully Erect for setting a League Record with a 12.21 K/9 in week 3 🏆
